name: Limoncello Senza (non-alcoholic)
description: About the product 🍋Ruby Spiritz Limoncello Senza is a non-alcoholic spirit inspired by classic Italian limoncello. It offers a bright citrus profile without alcohol, ideal for venues looking to expand their low- and no-alc options. Works well in spritzes or as a base in alcohol-free cocktails.Tasting notes 👃Lemon zest and natural citrus oils lead the profile, with light sweetness and a dry finish. Crisp and clean, it’s versatile in mixed drinks or simply with soda.About Ruby Aperitif 🍷Born from a passion for vermouth, Ruby Spiritz was founded by friends who explored Spain and Italy seeking the perfect blend. Starting with a single pallet in 2019, they’ve since developed their own organic range, collaborating with a top Italian distillery. Their vermouths capture the essence of togetherness, inviting consumers to share memorable moments over a glass.

name: Non-Alcoholic Sparkling Drink
description: About the product 🥂Heinz Wagner Non-Alcoholic is a refreshing, elegant sparkling alternative with just 3.6g sugar per 100ml—an unmatched achievement in its segment. Tasting notes 🍏Fruity, fresh, and perfectly balanced, this non-alcoholic sparkling drink combines bright acidity with subtle sweetness. Its vibrant aromas of pomegranate, citrus, elderflower, and a hint of vanilla lead to a lively interplay of cherry, vineyard peach, and green apple on the palate.About Heinz Wagner 🌸Heinz Wagner Sekt is a tribute to life, art, and the joy of fine sparkling wine. Founded by Max Wagner, it revives a family tradition rooted in winemaking, blending heritage with a modern spirit. Crafted entirely on-site, Heinz Wagner Sekt embodies authenticity, precision, and the belief in celebrating life’s finest moments together.
